methods.description: This method involves selecting the best fit models of sequence evolution for each genetic marker and inferring phylogenetic relationships among haplotypes using Bayesian MCMC simulations.

steps.description: Best fit models of sequence evolution were determined for each marker using the model selection procedures implemented in Kakusan 4 with output files configured for analysis in MrBayes 3.2.
steps.searchable_summary: Determine best fit models of sequence evolution using Kakusan 4 and configure for MrBayes 3.2

steps.description: Generated outputs for TreeFinder to evaluate a broader range of models.
steps.searchable_summary: Generate outputs for TreeFinder to evaluate more models

steps.description: For the ND3 gene, determined best fit models for partitioned (by codon position) and unpartitioned data using AICc4 weightings.
steps.searchable_summary: Determine best fit models for ND3 gene using AICc4 weightings

steps.description: Phylogenetic relationships amongst haplotypes were inferred using MrBayes 3.2 with P. temporalis included as an outgroup.
steps.searchable_summary: Infer phylogenetic relationships using MrBayes 3.2 with outgroup

steps.description: Bayesian MCMC simulations were run with four chains (1 cold, 3 hot) with 2 independent runs in each analysis and a coalescent tree prior.
steps.searchable_summary: Run Bayesian MCMC simulations with specified parameters

steps.description: The first twenty-five percent of samples were discarded as burn-in and to ensure convergence of both runs.
steps.searchable_summary: Discard initial samples as burn-in to ensure convergence

steps.description: Final MCMC runs comprised 750,000-5,000,000 generations with trees drawn at intervals to provide a sample of 1,000 for the posterior distribution in each run.
steps.searchable_summary: Run final MCMC simulations and sample trees for posterior distribution

steps.description: Potential scale reduction factors (PSRF) were evaluated at the completion of the run to ensure they were within the range 0.997,PSRF,1.003 indicating stationarity.

methods.description: This method describes the extraction, amplification, and sequencing of DNA from tissue samples to analyze mitochondrial genome fragments.

steps.description: Total cellular DNA was extracted from frozen or ethanol preserved liver, heart and muscle tissue using a salt:chloroform extraction method.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract DNA from tissue samples using salt:chloroform method

steps.description: A 386 bp fragment of the mitochondrial genome containing the entire ND3 gene was amplified from all samples using the universal avian primers ND3-L10755 and ND3-H11151.
steps.searchable_summary: Amplify ND3 gene fragment using specific primers

steps.description: A 413 base pair (bp) fragment from domain I of the mtDNA control region was amplified separately using the babbler-specific primers LD11 and HD14.
steps.searchable_summary: Amplify domain I fragment using specific primers

steps.description: PCR reactions were performed in 25 ml reaction volumes containing specified reagents and cycling conditions on a Hybaid Omn-E thermocycler.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform PCR reactions with specified conditions

steps.description: PCR products were visualised on an agarose gel to confirm amplification then purified using the UltraClean PCR Clean-up kit prior to sequencing.
steps.searchable_summary: Visualize and purify PCR products for sequencing

steps.description: DNA sequencing was performed with gamma 33 P-ATP end-labelled primers and the fmol DNA Sequencing System according to manufacturer's instructions.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform DNA sequencing with specified system

steps.description: Sequence ladders were read manually and the data aligned by eye.
steps.searchable_summary: Manually read and align DNA sequence ladders

steps.description: MEGA 4 was used to check base composition, translate ND3 into amino acids and check for stop codons and indels.
A BLAST search was conducted to ensure P. superciliosus ND3 and domain I sequences aligned with orthologous sequences from the avian mitochondrial genome.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct BLAST search for sequence alignment verification

steps.description: ND3 sequences were truncated to 351 bp prior to subsequent analyses to remove short regions of flanking tRNAs.
steps.searchable_summary: Truncate ND3 sequences to remove flanking tRNAs

steps.description: Sequences were submitted to GenBank under specified accessions.
